jobs.title: Part-Time Occupational Therapist (OT) Summer - Chicago
jobs.description: Eyas Landing, a leading therapeutic clinic in Chicago, IL is seeking a skilled and compassionate Part-Time Occupational Therapist (OT) to join our multidisciplinary team of top therapists while facilitating our therapeutic Summer Camp during the month of July, 2026 . This is an opportunity to provide evidence-based, play-focused pediatric therapy in a collaborative, innovative environment designed to help children thrive. Apply today at threebird

jobs.title: Hockey Instructor
jobs.description: Our Hockey Instructors are lead coaches who instruct our hockey classes for kids aged 5-14. Responsible for running a practice or a hockey skills station (instructors should be comfortable with running a skills station for up to 5 skaters at a time by themselves).
